---
title: "On War"
subtitle: "Why did I feel nothing when people talk about war?"
date: 13.03.2026
categories: [philosophy]
---

When I came to Germany I was already a politically aware individual. Thanks to my university upbringing. I was definitely a holder of leftist ideas, but can be pointed on the spectrum at non-violence part. I am vehemently supporting for human rights as well as dignity. And while I was in India I believed the continent of Europe is the torch bearer of these things (except Great Britain). In most of the cases it is.
